docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-17-2025 CONTINUED TO JAN-28-2026 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 78028103)

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 76638046) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FOX, ALAN BRYAN AS TO DEFENDANT RIVIAN AUTOMOTIVE, LLC DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-17-2025 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-12-2025 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-24-2025
NOTICE OF REMOTE APPEARANCE (TRANSACTION ID # 76638046) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FOX, ALAN BRYAN
SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 76638046) TO PLAINTIFF FOX, ALAN BRYAN
CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 76638046) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FOX, ALAN BRYAN
CONSENT TO ELECTRONIC SERVICE AND NOTICE OF ELECTRONIC SERVICE ADDRESS (TRANSACTION ID # 76638046) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FOX, ALAN BRYAN
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 76709145), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF FOX, ALAN BRYAN SERVED JUL-15-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RIVIAN AUTOMOTIVE, LLC
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-28-2026 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
